div1.entryFree:
Forgetfulness, 1) loss of memory, cessation to remember: Sonn. 122, 14. H4B III, 1, 8. Cor. V, 2, 92.
2) oblivion, the state of being forgotten: blind f. and dark oblivion, R3 III, 7, 129.
3) neglect, lack of duty: my love's f. Gentl. II, 2, 12. they confess toward thee f. Tim. V, 1, 147.
